name: EM Paradata Long-Format Mapping
description: Maps long-format property+provenance data to s3dgraphy graph. Each row represents ONE property for ONE stratigraphic unit, with its extractor and document provenance. Data is 'baked' into the GraphML as ParadataNodeGroups. Differs from site_properties_mapping (wide format, volatile) in that this format supports per-property provenance chains and is permanently embedded in the Extended Matrix.

US_ID.description: Must match an existing US ID from stratigraphy import.

PROPERTY_TYPE.description: Property type from em_qualia_types.json vocabulary (e.g., Height, Material, Building Technique, Conservation State).

VALUE.description: The value of the property (e.g., '2.5m', 'Tufo giallo', 'opus reticulatum').

EXTRACTOR.description: Specific text passage, observation, or measurement description extracted from the source document. NOT the agent/author identity.

DOCUMENT.description: Specific source document reference (e.g., 'field_notes_day5.pdf', 'lab_report_042.pdf'). Leave empty when using combiner sources.

COMBINER_REASONING.description: If present, the VALUE is the result of combined reasoning from multiple sources. Describes the reasoning process that led to the conclusion.

COMBINER_SOURCE_1.description: First source document for combined reasoning.

COMBINER_SOURCE_2.description: Second source document for combined reasoning.
